grant_title: NYS Office of Children and Family Services (NYS OCFS) Grant Funding - 2026-2027 Youth Program Funding
project_area: Youth development, sports and education opportunities, and runaway/homeless youth services
demographic_requirements: Programs must serve Dutchess County youth under 21 years of age (YDP and RHY) or ages 6-17 (YSEF). Programs must be free to all youth. RHY programs must support runaway and homeless youth under age 18.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include nonprofit organizations, local government agencies, educational institutions, and community-based organizations operating in Dutchess County, NY. Programs must align with OCFS life areas (Economic Security, Physical and Emotional Health, Education, Citizenship/Civic Engagement, Family, and Community) and meet specific criteria for each funding category (YDP, YSEF, RHY). Applications must be submitted via the Dutchess County Grant Portal.
